acceptedAnswer.description:
**No, AEO is stricter tier for highest sensitivity; regular Confidential allows parties.**[1][2]

Overuse of AEO sanctioned.[1]

- **Tiers common**: Confidential < AEO.[1]
- **Justify level**: Competitor harm.[2]
- **Abuse warning**: All designations.[1]

Propose tiered order early; downgrade via motion.
